rate_limit: Wait 60s, switch to free model (hunter-alpha), retry
429: Rate limit hit. Wait 60s, reduce context, switch profile
403: IP ban. Use Tor proxy: socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050 or HTTP proxy 127.0.0.1:8118
401: Auth expired. Check auth-profiles.json, try account2 profile
404 no endpoints: Model unavailable. Switch to next model in fallback chain
no tool support: Model can't use tools. Switch to tool-capable model
Timeout 60000ms exceeded: WebGL loading too long. Increase timeout or use domcontentloaded
page.goto: Timeout: Screenshot timeout. Use domcontentloaded instead of networkidle
Command aborted by signal SIGTERM: Gateway restart killed session. Re-check state after restart
context overflow: Session too long. Use /reset or /compact, then continue
SIGTERM: Process killed. Check if gateway restart needed, re-verify state
Connection refused: Server down. Check nginx: systemctl restart nginx
WASM not updated: CI still building. Wait for gh run list to show completed/success
Scene looks wrong: Check WASM timestamp vs code. Force cache-bust: ?v=TIMESTAMP
openai-codex rate limit: Both profiles in cooldown. Switch to hunter-alpha, continue working
git push rejected: Pull first: git pull --rebase, then push again
Unity compile error: Check C# syntax in RuntimeSceneBuilder.cs, fix and recommit
robot colors wrong: Check eyeCol values in BuildAgents(). Each robot needs distinct color
floor dark: Check floor color in BuildRoom() - should be (0.68, 0.62, 0.52)
